# 设计系统审计报告模板 (Design System Report Template)

## 1. Report 模板

```markdown
## 设计系统与视觉审计报告 (Design System Audit Report)

## 基本标识信息 (Identity)

- 生成工具 (Generated By): /design-system-audit
- 生成时间 (Generated At): <ISO 8601>
- 审计特征与页面 (Feature / Surface): <feature or route>
- 关联规格设计锚点 (Source Anchors): <NFR-UX-* / DSN-UI-* / screenshots>

## 审计与测试范围 (Scope)
|  | 页面/路由 (Surface) | 拆分组件 (Component) | 覆盖的数据状态 (States Checked) | 响应式视口 (Viewports) | 验证证据路径 (Evidence) |  |
|  | --------- | -------------- | ---------------- | ----------- | ---------- |  |
|  | <route> | <components> | 加载中/错误/空白/成功 (loading/error/empty/success) | 桌面端/平板/移动端 (desktop/tablet/mobile) | <path> |  |

## 组件、Tokens 与无障碍审计 (Component / Token / A11y Verdict)
|  | 审计项 (Check) | 运行状态 (Status) | 运行证据/日志 (Evidence) | 审计发现项 ID (Finding) |  |
|  | ------- | -------- | ---------- | --------- |  |
|  | 既有组件复用情况 (Component inventory) | PASS / FAIL | <path> | <id> |  |
|  | 设计变量/Tokens漂移 (Token drift) | PASS / FAIL | <path> | <id> |  |
|  | 无障碍基础线 (A11y baseline) | PASS / FAIL | <path> | <id> |  |

## 视觉表现审计 (Visual QA Verdict)
|  | 页面/路由 (Surface) | 响应式视口 (Viewport) | 运行状态 (Status) | 验证证据路径 (Evidence) | 增量复核记录 (Recheck) |  |
|  | --------- | ---------- | -------- | ---------- | --------- |  |
|  | <surface> | `<viewport>` | PASS / FAIL | <path> | <path or N/A> |  |

## 去AI味与领域信息密度审计 (Anti-AI Taste Gate)
|  | 审计规则 (Rule) | 运行状态 (Status) | 验证证据路径 (Evidence) | 审计发现项 ID (Finding) |  |
|  | ------ | -------- | ---------- | --------- |  |
|  | AAT-R1 去AI味审查 (Anti-AI Taste) | PASS / FAIL | <path> | <id> |  |

## 审计发现项清单 (Findings)
|  | 发现项 ID (Finding ID) | 严重程度 (Severity) | 故障类型 (Type) | 处置路由 (Route) | 缺陷总结 (Summary) |  |
|  | ------------ | ---------- | ------ | ------- | --------- |  |
|  | DSA-FIND-### | 低/中/高 (low / medium / high) | component/token/a11y/visual/taste | /specs-write / /specs-execute / direct | <summary> |  |

## 门禁最终结论 (Gate Verdict)

- 设计系统门禁状态 (Design System Gate): PASS / FAIL
- 阻碍性合规缺口 (Blocking Findings): <None or list>
- 推荐改善路由 (Required Route): <route>

```

## 2. 红绿判定

| 规则 ID (Rule ID) | 字段 | 运行状态 (PASS) | 失败动作 (FAIL) |
| --------- | ------ | ------ | ------ |
| DSR-R1 | Source Anchors | NFR-UX / DSN-UI / screenshot 至少一类可追溯 | 无事实源 |
| DSR-R2 | Component / Token | finding 全低风险或已给修复 route | token drift high 未处理 |
| DSR-R3 | A11y | high / medium a11y finding 为 0 或已阻塞 | A11y risk 仍 PASS |
| DSR-R4 | Visual QA | 关键路径有截图证据 | 单 viewport / 无状态面 |
| DSR-R5 | Taste Gate | AAT blocking finding 为 0 | 模板味 finding 未处理 |
| DSR-R6 | Route | 每个 finding 有唯一推荐 route | “后续优化”无 owner |

## 3. 审计发现项严重程度 (Finding Severity)

| 严重程度 (Severity) | 定义 | Done 条件 |
| ---------- | ------ | ----------- |
| high | 阻塞用户完成关键任务、违反 A11y、严重模板化影响产品可信度 | 必须修复或回 spec |
| medium | 影响可用性、一致性、响应式或关键状态理解 | 本 release 前修复或显式 defer with owner |
| low | 局部 polish，不影响主路径 | 可归 backlog，但需记录 |

## 4. 路由规则

| 条件 | 目标路由 (Route) |
| ------ | ------- |
| UX 契约缺失 / 信息架构重排 | `/specs-write` |
| CSS / component / copy 小修 | `/specs-execute` 或 direct |
| A11y 测试基础设施缺 | `/repo-safety-setup` 或 `/specs-execute` |
| 视觉证据不足 | `/design-system-audit` Phase 3 |
| 只需审查已实现 diff | `review` skill |
